# Toremifene 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Toremifene 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Toremifene</strong> 目前有 <strong>15 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Toremifene 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：First line hormone treatment of hormone-dependent metastatic breast cancer in postmenopausal patients.Fareston is not recommended for patients with estrogen receptor negative tumours.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>HIV infectious disease（99.4%）</li>
<li>simian immunodeficiency virus infection（99.0%）</li>
<li>feline acquired immunodeficiency syndrome（99.0%）</li>
<li>neurodevelopmental disorder with ataxic gait, absent speech, and decreased cortical white matter（99.0%）</li>
<li>multiple endocrine neoplasia（98.9%）</li>
<li>AIDS（98.6%）</li>
<li>obsolete familial combined hyperlipidemia（98.4%）</li>
<li>female breast carcinoma（98.4%）</li>
<li>nephrogenic syndrome of inappropriate antidiuresis（97.8%）</li>
<li>gout（97.7%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid arthritis（97.7%）</li>
<li>breast fibrocystic disease（97.5%）</li>
<li>Plasmodium falciparum malaria（97.3%）</li>
<li>AIDS related complex（97.0%）</li>
<li>congenital human immunodeficiency virus（97.0%）</li>
<li>cholecystolithiasis（96.8%）</li>
<li>duodenal obstruction（96.6%）</li>
<li>pneumocystosis（96.4%）</li>
<li>benign mammary dysplasia（96.4%）</li>
<li>brachydactyly-syndactyly syndrome（96.4%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/toremifene/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
